chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 349 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.11.2023 Mr. Ali Ahmed Rind, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.8 and 9. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Grievance of the petitioner is that she has filed a complaint before Health Care Commission against respondents No.8 & 9 in October 2021, but that complaint has not been decided yet. Learned AAG and Advocate for respondents submit that they have no objection if directions are issued to Chief Executive Officer, Sindh Health Care Commission, Hyderabad at S.H.C.C. 2nd Floor, Block-C, FTC Building, Shahrah-e-Faisal, Karachi to decide the complaint within a reasonable time. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of, and the Chief Executive Officer, Sindh Health Care Commission is directed to decide the aforesaid complaint of petitioner within a period of one month and submit compliance report. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of learned Additional Advocate General Sindh for a perusal and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
